summary: Iteration 35 - Branding/Terminology Cleanup Testing. Verified all frontend pages (FAQ, Terms, Privacy, Security, Home, Register, ForgotPassword, Search) show SeniorAdvisor branding with senior care terminology. No U-CAN or pet-related terms found in user-visible UI. Backend APIs (login, providers, register-provider) working correctly.

minor.issue: Email templates still contain pet-related user-visible text: 'Mascotas', 'Cuidador', 'Buscar Otros Cuidadores', 'pet_name'. Lines 55, 61, 97, 166, 236, 312, 340, 372, 405. These appear in emails sent to users.

issues: Routes /terminos-y-condiciones and /politica-privacidad mentioned in footer links lead to empty page (404). Actual routes are /terminos and /privacidad. Footer may have incorrect links.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/auth/register-provider - Endpoint works, creates pending provider
POST /api/auth/register-provider - Duplicate email returns proper error
POST /api/auth/register-provider - Success message uses correct SeniorAdvisor terminology
frontend_ui_tests: /faq - SeniorAdvisor branding, senior care terminology, NO old pet terms
/terminos - SeniorAdvisor branding, senior care terminology, NO old pet terms
/privacidad - SeniorAdvisor branding, senior care terminology, NO old pet terms
/seguridad - SeniorAdvisor branding, senior care terminology, NO old pet terms
/ (Home) - SeniorAdvisor branding, 'adultos mayores' terminology, NO old pet terms
/register - Has provider registration link to /registrar-residencia, SeniorAdvisor logo
/search - Loads with 50 providers, correct senior care service types, NO old pet terms

action_items: MEDIUM: Update /app/backend/email_service.py to replace pet-related terms in email templates with senior care equivalents (Mascotas->Paciente/Residente, Cuidador->Proveedor, pet_name->resident_name)
critical_code_review_comments: email_service.py has USER-VISIBLE pet terminology in email templates that will be seen by users
Footer links to /terminos-y-condiciones and /politica-privacidad don't match actual routes /terminos and /privacidad
seed_data_creation: Created test providers with TEST_ prefix emails during pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35: Frontend branding cleanup COMPLETE - all pages show SeniorAdvisor with senior care terminology. Backend APIs working. One remaining issue: email_service.py still has pet-related text in email templates (Mascotas, Cuidador, pet_name) that users will see when they receive emails. These need to be updated to senior care equivalents.
